title: Claude Fable 5 with Harness Engineering & Loops Will Do Everything.
summary: Cyril Imhof covers Claude Fable 5 and discusses harness engineering, AI loops, and their applications in regulated industries. The video explores tensions between open and closed source AI models, risks of model shutdowns, and the state of AI-powered SaaS, drawing on experience since 2023 in the space.
writeup: Cyril Imhof examines Claude Fable 5 alongside harness engineering and AI loops, with attention to how multi-agent systems, prompt engineering, and foundation models apply in regulated industries. The video weighs tensions between open and closed source models, the risk of model shutdowns, and the current state of AI-powered SaaS. Imhof draws on work in the space since 2023 to frame these tradeoffs.
